title: CoverageBaseline
description: Cached test-coverage floor for the coverage-delta PR guard. Lives at <repo>/.nyann/coverage-baseline.json. Written by `bin/guards/coverage-delta.sh --update-baseline` (run on the base branch / post-merge) and by the guard's first run when no baseline exists. The guard compares the branch's current coverage against this baseline and warns (advisory) on a drop beyond the profile's guards.coverage_delta_threshold.

tool.description: Which coverage-tools stack produced the figure.

coverage_pct.description: Total line-coverage percentage at baseline time (0–100).

recorded_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the baseline was recorded.

commit.description: Optional git commit the baseline was recorded at (HEAD when written). Free-form so short or full SHAs both validate.
